metadata.coverage: 363 383 297 wew files (21 TB) incrementally crawled between 10 September 2018 and 2 November 2018 mainly from .PT domain and web sites crawled during the previous crawl.
metadata.creator: Portuguese Web Archive
metadata.notes: All the items of the AWP28 crawl are identified by the custom field pwacrawlid:AWP28. The AWP28 crawl is complete because it was performed without using DeDuplicator.
metadata.subject: Complete crawl of the Portuguese web; Portuguese Web Archive; Portuguese online publications; pwacrawlid:AWP28; 2018
metadata.title: The twenty-seventh crawl of the Portuguese web (incremental), performed in 2018 (AWP28).
